description: Lead multi-institution research initiatives on Himalayan ecosystems, glaciology, and AI-driven environmental monitoring.
highlights: Established three permanent monitoring stations above 4,000m altitude
Authored 15+ peer-reviewed publications in Nature, Global Change Biology, and The Cryosphere
Secured $2.4M in research funding from ICIMOD, SDC, and private foundations
Built and mentored a 12-person interdisciplinary research team

description: Contributed to regional climate adaptation programmes across the Hindu Kush–Himalaya region.
highlights: Co-authored ICIMOD's 2017 regional climate change assessment
Led field expeditions in Bhutan, Nepal, and Northern India

description: Conducted high-altitude botanical surveys and biodiversity inventories.
